opd.title: Visits & OPD Registry
opd.subtitle: Today's active queue and visit registry.
opd.no_rooms_body: Patient cards show "Not assigned" until you create rooms and link doctors.
opd.registry_hint: Unconsulted OPD visits from yesterday return to today's queue each morning.
opd.registry_active_hint: {{total}} registry match(es) · {{queue}} in today's queue · showing page of {{shown}}
opd.queue_no_match: No patients in today's queue match your filters.
opd.menu_return_confirm: Return visit {{ticket}} to today's active queue?
opd.invoice_modal_missing: Invoice modal not loaded on this page.
opd.workflow_footnote: Station 2 — Front Desk Check-in: Existing patients → skip to Station 4 (Cashier) · New patients → Station 3 (Registration) first · After payment → Station 5 (OPD Queue).
opd.carry_flash_one: 1 patient from yesterday was not consulted and has been returned to today's queue (queue number renewed — first in line).
opd.carry_flash_many: {{count}} patients from yesterday were not consulted and have been returned to today's queue (queue numbers renewed — first in line).

card.payment_blocked_default: Payment code cannot be used for consultation.
card.call_hint: Announce on lobby display and start consultation
card.vitals_submitted_locked: Vitals recorded — waiting for or in consultation. No further changes.

treatment.title: OPD Treatment & Prescriptions
treatment.terminate_confirm: Terminate this treatment? Pending doses will be hidden from the nurse chart.
treatment.alert_on_administer: Alert me when nursing administers medications
treatment.alert_on_administer_hint: You will receive an in-app notification each time a dose is marked as given.
treatment.no_active: No active treatment. Start one to prescribe nurse-administered medications.
treatment.bill_hint: Each prescription line is billed at unit price × doses and appears at Cashier when pending.
treatment.add_rx_hint: Catalog price is locked per dose. Custom drugs bill at 0 FCFA until cashier sets price.
treatment.protocol_hint: Nurses administer doses from the drug chart. Billing updates when you add, extend, shorten, or remove prescriptions.
treatment.no_active_chart: No active treatment for this visit.
treatment.no_doses_window: No doses due in the current window.
treatment.consult_link_hint: For nurse-administered medications with dose tracking and cashier billing, use OPD Treatment.

opd.emergency_hint: Bypass prepayment — goes to A&E triage.
opd.payment_hint: Enter the payment code from Cashier (Station 4), validate, then confirm visit details.
opd.emergency_switch_msg: You will be taken to A&E Quick Registration. This patient bypasses cashier pre-payment and goes straight to triage.
opd.vitals_payment_cashier_msg: This patient does not have a valid payment code. Please ask the patient to obtain a payment code from the cashier before recording vitals.
opd.triage_subtitle: Submitting advances patient to Waiting Doctor.
opd.room_subtitle: Pin the visit to the correct room for queue and call screen accuracy.

frontDesk.title: Front Desk Operations
frontDesk.subtitle: Live Command Center — {{date}}
frontDesk.admin_subtitle: Quick links for front desk staff.

cashier.title: Payment and Billing
cashier.subtitle: Collect fees · Issue codes · Manage receipts · Wallet payments

eod.title: End of day reconciliation
eod.subtitle: Close the day — compare system totals with physical counts
eod.reconciliation_hint: Enter physical / terminal counts. Variance = declared − system.

daily_summary.title: Daily transactions summary
daily_summary.subtitle: Cumulative collections by service category
daily_summary.filter_patient_ph: Name, ticket code, or patient ID
daily_summary.empty_filtered: No transactions match the current filters.
daily_summary.empty: No paid transactions for this period.

cashier.invoices_empty_hint: Create an invoice for services or pharmacy items, then collect payment from this list.
cashier.invoice_patient_ph: Search patient name, phone, or ID…
cashier.invoice_err_lines: Add at least one priced line.
cashier.batch_select_all: Select all paid on this page
cashier.batch_select_patient: Select all receipts for this patient
cashier.empty_rx: No doctor prescriptions with service codes.
cashier.emg_hint: Emergency patients with unpaid charges awaiting collection.

emergency.title: Emergency Department
emergency.subtitle: Triage-driven workflow · Retrospective billing on disposition
emergency.my_er_queue_hint: These patients are in A&E — not on the OPD queue. Open the ER chart to consult at the bedside.
emergency.er_opd_separate: Emergency patients are managed on this board only. They do not appear on the OPD queue when assigned to an ER doctor.

patientChart.record_vitals_hint: Enter current measurements for this patient. Values are saved to the chart and linked to the latest OPD visit when available.

consultation.chief_ph: Describe why the patient is here…
consultation.history_ph: Present illness, past history, review of systems…
consultation.soap_pick_hint: Selection is added to the notes below. Type freely if not listed or to add more detail.
consultation.plan_item_ph: e.g. Continue medication, follow-up in 2 weeks, patient education…
consultation.plan_hint: Press Enter for the next numbered line. Each item is saved as part of the clinical plan.
consultation.med_pick_drug_hint: Pick from catalog or enter a custom drug
consultation.lab_add_hint: Search and click to add laboratory tests
consultation.lab_order_hint: Ordered tests are numbered and sent to the laboratory queue on completion.
consultation.rad_add_hint: Search and click to add radiology exams
consultation.rad_order_hint: Ordered exams are numbered and sent to the radiology queue on completion.
consultation.no_pharmacy_catalog: No pharmacy catalog items — add drugs under Service Catalog → Pharmacy.
consultation.refer_locked: Set from the cashier payment ticket — cannot be changed here.
consultation.fee_locked: Fee is fixed from the validated payment ticket.
consultation.interval_hint: Used for payment validity when the patient returns.
consultation.follow_up_check: Patient may return for a follow-up consultation (same payment rules)
consultation.follow_up_info: Check this to allow the patient to use Follow Up from the chart or OPD queue while their payment code is still valid.
consultation.follow_up_requested: Follow-up return was requested for this consultation.
consultation.complete_hint: Completing sends lab, radiology and pharmacy orders to the cashier queue.
consultation.retake_vitals_hint: Send patient back to OPD queue so nursing can record new vitals
consultation.retake_vitals_confirm: Send this patient back to the OPD queue for nursing to retake vitals? Current vitals will be replaced when new ones are saved.
consultation.select_patient_hint: Select a patient from the OPD queue to start a consultation.
consultation.custom_drug_hint: Hospital catalog or custom drug not stocked here.
consultation.custom_drug_field_ph: Drug name if not in hospital catalog
consultation.custom_drug_field_hint: Use when prescribing a medication not stocked here or a different brand/formulation.
consultation.custom_lab_field_ph: Lab test name if not in hospital catalog
consultation.custom_lab_field_hint: Use when ordering a test not listed by the laboratory.
consultation.custom_rad_field_ph: Radiology exam name if not in hospital catalog
consultation.custom_rad_field_hint: Use when ordering an exam not listed by radiology.
consultation.catalog_drug_hint: Search the hospital pharmacy catalog — type to filter instantly.
consultation.meds_custom_hint: Search the hospital catalog for drugs, lab tests, and radiology. Use the custom drug field below each catalog pick for medications not stocked here.
consultation.med_qty_fill_dose: Enter dosage, frequency & days to auto-calculate qty.
consultation.err_med_incomplete: Each prescribed drug requires dosage, frequency, and days. Check: {{drug}}.
consultation.med_instructions_ph: e.g. After food, dilute in 100 ml NS…

appointments.title: Appointments
appointments.subtitle: Schedule and manage clinical visits.
appointments.search_ph: Search patient, doctor, department, or ID…

consultationStart.title: New consultation
consultationStart.subtitle: Select a patient from today's OPD queue to open the consultation form.
consultationStart.empty_title: No patients are ready for consultation right now.
consultationStart.empty_hint: Register a visit on the OPD queue, or open a patient from the directory and start a consultation from their chart.

emergencyVisit.closed_banner: This ER visit is closed — chart is read-only.
emergencyVisit.create_consult_first: Create a consultation before opening the prescription registry or other clinical documentation that requires SOAP.
emergencyVisit.pathway_ipd_hint: Hospitalise — ER charges transfer to IPD bill
emergencyVisit.charges_hint: Lab/radiology charges alert the department inbox but do not authorize new tests. Use Phase 2 · New Order for tests.
emergencyVisit.mlc_lock_msg: Once locked, this Medico-Legal Case record cannot be edited — only viewed and reprinted.
emergencyVisit.mlc_lock_fallback: Lock the MLC permanently? Once locked, the record cannot be edited.
emergencyVisit.order_charge_preview: Will charge {{total}} FCFA to credit tab

doctorPortal.decline_hint: Optionally let the patient know why this request cannot be accepted.
doctorPortal.decline_reason_ph: e.g. Out of office that day, please rebook for next week

labWorkflow.validate_subtitle: Scan or enter the service code on the order slip
labWorkflow.no_in_house: No in-house items on this code.
labWorkflow.external_items: {{count}} external item(s) — patient obtains outside facility.
labWorkflow.pha_medications_hint: Dispense one medication at a time using the button on each line. Other lines stay pending until you dispense them.
labWorkflow.pha_external_hint: Patient obtains these outside the hospital. Acknowledge when documented on the chart.
labWorkflow.pha_medications_hint_off_catalog: All doctor prescriptions appear here, including custom items with no price yet. Mark off-catalog items as available so Cashier can price them; dispense only after payment.
labWorkflow.pha_off_catalog_toggle_hint: Product can be supplied but is not yet in inventory. Enter the unit price, then send the patient to Cashier.
labWorkflow.pha_off_catalog_price_hint: Enter the unit price for this off-catalog item. Cashier will bill the patient on the same PHA code.
labWorkflow.pha_awaiting_cashier_hint: Sent to Cashier for pricing. After the patient pays, validate this same PHA code again to dispense.
labWorkflow.pha_off_catalog_stock_hint: Off-catalog dispense: stock may go negative until inventory is updated.
labWorkflow.pha_force_stock: Dispense anyway (stock will go to zero if needed)
labWorkflow.blurb_orders: Doctor-ordered tests from consultations. Acknowledge when seen.
labWorkflow.blurb_pharmacy: Doctor-prescribed medications from consultations. Acknowledge when seen.

radiologyRegistry.empty: No radiology requests for this filter.
radiologyRegistry.results_subtitle: All imaging results — select exams to print patient handover packages.

radiologyWorkflow.title: Radiology workflow
radiologyWorkflow.subtitle: Kanban board for imaging exams — start, complete, and report.
radiologyWorkflow.start_custom_msg: No linked RAD template code was found. Start this exam with a custom report?
radiologyWorkflow.reset_msg: Move this exam back to the pending queue?

prescriptions.subtitle: Historical log of clinical medication orders.
prescriptions.search_ph: Search patient, Rx ID, or title…
prescriptions.empty: No prescriptions found in the registry.

callQueue.subtitle: Outpatient waiting display · today only
callQueue.empty_title: No active OPD visits in the queue right now.
callQueue.empty_hint: When you register at OPD reception, your name will appear here.
callQueue.launcher_subtitle: Open a board on each TV or tablet. No password required after first tap.
callQueue.launcher_footer: Bookmark this page on reception PCs

doctorSchedule.title: My schedule
doctorSchedule.no_patients: No patients are waiting for you right now.
doctorSchedule.no_opd: No OPD patients assigned to you today.
doctorSchedule.warn_off_but_appointments: You are marked off duty today but have scheduled appointments.
doctorSchedule.warn_off_but_hours: You are marked off duty but still have clinic hours configured.
doctorSchedule.warn_on_call_with_appointments: You are on-call today while appointments are scheduled.
doctorSchedule.check_in_ok: Patient checked in to OPD queue.
doctorSchedule.check_in_linked: Patient already linked to OPD queue.
doctorSchedule.check_in_not_today: This appointment is not scheduled for today.

cashierPrepay.title: Service Payment
cashierPrepay.subtitle: Create a payment ticket for front desk / clinical stations.
cashierPrepay.search_ph: Type name or phone to search…
cashierPrepay.manual_ins_hint: When verified insurer % differs from patient file.
cashierPrepay.no_doctors_hint: No doctors match this service{{spec}}. Update staff profiles or pick another option.
cashierPrepay.payment_not_received: Ticket cannot be issued, payment not received
cashierPrepay.betterpay_scan_hint: Patient scans the QR code or opens the link. The ticket is issued automatically when payment is confirmed.
cashierPrepay.payment_timeout: Payment timed out — see Pending Payments to retry
cashierPrepay.wallet_deduct_hint: The ticket is issued only if the wallet has sufficient balance.
cashierPrepay.err_patient: Select a patient before issuing the ticket.
cashierPrepay.err_service: Select a service from the catalog.
cashierPrepay.err_doctor: Select an assigned doctor for this consultation.
cashierPrepay.err_specialisation: Select a specialisation for specialist consultation.
cashierPrepay.err_no_lines: Add at least one service to the ticket.
cashierPrepay.cart_empty_hint: Pick a category and service, then click Add service for each line — or select one service and click Issue ticket directly. You can combine consultation, lab, radiology, pharmacy, and other services on one ticket.
cashierPrepay.insurance_applied: Insurance coverage {{pct}}% applied to all lines.

opdOrdersBill.title: OPD Orders — Bill
opdOrdersBill.custom_price_hint: Custom or non-catalog items need a price before billing. Enter the correct amount in the Unit price column.
opdOrdersBill.off_catalog_price_hint: Off-catalog items confirmed by Pharmacy need a price before billing. Saisissez le montant indiqué par la Pharmacie.
opdOrdersBill.awaiting_pharmacist_price_hint: Some off-catalog items still need a price from Pharmacy before you can bill them.
opdOrdersBill.awaiting_pharmacist_price_row_hint: Pharmacist must enter the price for this off-catalog item.
opdOrdersBill.awaiting_pharmacy_hint: Custom prescriptions marked below must be confirmed by Pharmacy as available off-catalog before you can bill them.
opdOrdersBill.awaiting_pharmacy_row_hint: Pharmacist must confirm this item is available off-catalog before billing.
opdOrdersBill.enter_price_hint: Enter the unit price so the patient can pay and receive this service.
opdOrdersBill.external_hint: Patient will obtain this service outside the hospital — not billed or performed here.
opdOrdersBill.partial_pay_hint: Uncheck items the patient cannot pay now. They stay pending and can be billed on a later visit.
opdOrdersBill.deferred_hint: Not included in this bill — pay later when funds are available.

opdRefund.title: Refund prescription items
opdRefund.select_item: Select at least one paid item to refund.
opdRefund.hint: Refund lab, radiology, or pharmacy items the patient paid for but cannot receive (not in hospital catalog, out of stock, or unavailable).
opdRefund.no_refundable: No refundable items for this prescription. Only paid items not yet dispensed or performed can be refunded.

bookAppointment.title: Book Appointment
bookAppointment.subtitle: Schedule a clinical visit for a patient.
bookAppointment.no_doctors_hint: No active doctors are assigned to {{department}}. Pick another department or update staff profiles.
bookAppointment.no_slots_manual: No slots available — enter time manually below.
bookAppointment.click_or_manual: Click a slot or enter time manually.
bookAppointment.visit_in_person_hint: Patient attends on site. Confirmed when booked by staff.
bookAppointment.visit_telemedicine_hint: Video consultation. Requires cashier payment code; doctor confirms before the visit.
bookAppointment.select_patient_first: Select a patient before validating the payment code.
bookAppointment.enter_payment_code: Enter the teleconsultation payment code from the cashier.
bookAppointment.validate_payment_before_book: Validate the payment code before submitting.
bookAppointment.tele_pending_hint: Telemedicine requests stay pending until the doctor confirms the date.

newPrescription.title: New Prescription
newPrescription.subtitle: Create a clinical medication order for pharmacy.

portalQuick.subtitle: Jump straight to your most-used workspaces

portalDescriptions.director: Executive overview — clinical operations, staff, and hospital performance.
portalDescriptions.assistant_director: Operational oversight — dashboards, reports, and hospital performance.
portalDescriptions.secretary: Executive support for the Hospital Director — calendar, briefings, and reports.
portalDescriptions.front_desk: Reception, triage, appointments, and patient registration.
portalDescriptions.nurse: Ward board, vitals, IPD medication, and nursing care.
portalDescriptions.labtech: Lab worklist, specimen processing, and results.
portalDescriptions.pharmacy: Dispensing queue, prescriptions, and drug inventory.
portalDescriptions.cashier: Payments, receipts, and billing at the desk.
portalDescriptions.accountant: Accounting, journals, expenses, and financial reports.
portalDescriptions.patient_support: Patient self-service login (secondary access for front desk / nursing).

validate_modal.hint: Enter the service code from the patient's paid ticket before opening the workbench.
validate_modal.format_hint: Format: {{prefix}}-yyyy-NNNNNN · IPD/Emergency orders skip this step.

erDischarge.clinical_pending: Doctor must sign clinical discharge in Disposition below.
erDischarge.financial_pending: Patient at Cashier — settle bill and receive discharge code.
erDischarge.confirm_hint: Enter the ER payment code from Cashier to release the patient.
erDischarge.code_valid: Code validated — you may confirm discharge.
erDischarge.awaiting_financial_banner: Clinically discharged — awaiting financial settlement at Cashier, then confirm discharge below.
erDischarge.settle_hint: After clinical discharge, collect any remaining ER charges and issue the discharge code for ER staff.
erDischarge.cashier_final_hint: Patients signed out by the doctor. Collect remaining charges and issue the ER discharge code (same workflow as IPD).
erDischarge.cashier_none: No ER patients awaiting final settlement.

doctor_er_inbox.title: Doctor · Alerts inbox
doctor_er_inbox.blurb: Emergency arrivals and assistance requests appear in red. OPD medication administration alerts (when enabled on treatment) appear in yellow.
